title: Star Wars Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 4}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures04-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 4:
Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[January]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 4|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 4]], which was released in [[January]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0439458838 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]{{CSWECite|I|151|Cradossk}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series to a year before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 3: The Hostage Princess|The Hostage Princess]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes|The Shape-Shifter Strikes]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters''''' was the fourth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 4|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 4]] in [[January]] [[2003]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Count Dooku has discovered a conspiracy that he wants stopped.'' ''He knows just the bounty hunter to stop it.'' ''Jango Fett''. ''May the Force be with you''. ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures04-Book.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures04-Book-Full.jpg File:Adventures04-GameBook.jpg|Game Book
